patch.value:
Based on comprehensive dogfood audit on 2026-04-28:

1. CORE COMMANDS: All 40+ commands verified (create/list/get/update/close/claim/release/comments/notes/learnings/append/deps/history/activity/aggregate/context/stats/contracts/validate/health/calendar/search/reindex/templates/test/test-all/config/init/completion/gc/normalize/update-many/dedupe-audit/comments-audit/files/docs/restore/delete/start-task/pause-task/close-task). All produce correct output.

2. SDK: Fully fledged with 100+ typed exports, 9 extension capabilities, defineExtension helper, comprehensive CLI contracts v4 schema. Best practice: typed, versioned, documented.

3. CALENDAR: All views (agenda/day/week/month), all formats (markdown/toon/json), filters, recurrence expansion, reminders, deadlines, events all functional.

4. EXTENSIONS: Global/project layering with priority precedence, lifecycle hooks, command/renderer/parser/preflight/service overrides. Fully extensible for any project type.

5. TELEMETRY: End-to-end pipeline operational. Client queuing with retry. Server: 9 Docker services healthy. 22k+ events in Postgres. Prometheus monitoring 6 targets. Grafana dashboards accessible.

6. SECURITY: No credentials in source. Telemetry data gitignored. Sensitive field redaction in telemetry payloads.

Conclusion: PM CLI is production-ready as a universal, extensible project management tool optimized for agents.
Decision: PM CLI audit confirms production readiness
2026-04-28 comprehensive audit confirms all subsystems are functional and following best practices
Decision recorded: PM CLI is production-ready

author: cursor-agent
